Title: Hacks
Writer: Lucia Aniello, Paul W. Downs, Jen Statsky
Actors: Jean Smart, Hannah Einbinder, Carl Clemons-Hopkins
Plot: Explores a dark mentorship that forms between Deborah Vance, a legendary Las Vegas comedian, and an entitled, outcast 25-year-old.
Awards: Won 12 Primetime Emmys. 99 wins & 243 nominations total
